---
title: "About"
---

## Biography

Luis Henrique de Lima received his B.Sc. (2009) and Ph.D. (2014) in Physics from the State University of Campinas (Unicamp), Brazil.

During his Ph.D., he was a visiting researcher at the University of Zurich, Switzerland (2013).

He carried out postdoctoral research at the Institute of Physics of Unicamp (2015, 2017) and at the PEARL beamline of the Swiss Light Source (SLS), Switzerland (2016).

From 2018 to 2025, he was an Adjunct Professor at the Federal University of ABC (UFABC), Santo André-SP, Brazil.

Since 2025, he has been an Adjunct Professor at the Federal University of Technology – Paraná (UTFPR), Ponta Grossa-PR, Brazil.

---

## Research Areas

- Condensed Matter Physics
- Surface Science
- Two-dimensional Materials
